---
title: "Bootstrapping cell labels"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Libraries and set up

```{r message = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
.libPaths(c("/enna/users/stfour/shreyar/Desktop/lib/", "/enna/nobackup/biostat/Rpackages/v4/"))
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(lme4)
  library(lmerTest)
  library(SpatialDatasets)
  library(tidySingleCellExperiment)
  library(tidyverse)
  library(Seurat)
  library(caret) 
  library(spatstat.geom)
  library(data.table)
  library(Statial)
  library(BiocParallel)
})

theme_set(theme_classic())
```

```{r}
seuratObj = readRDS("./data/heartSeurat.rds")   
seuratObj
```

```{r}
spe = SpatialDatasets::spe_Amancherla_2025()
spe = spe |> rename(c(cellType = ct_second_pass, x = adj_x_centroid, y = adj_y_centroid, imageID = Sample, subject = patient_id))
spe$cellType = as.character(spe$cellType)
spe$imageID = as.character(spe$imageID)
spe$subject = as.character(spe$subject)


# filter to T cells
Tcells = spe |> filter(cellType %in% c("CD8+ T cells", "CD4+ T cells", "Proliferating T cells", "Treg"))
Tcells
```

## EDA

```{r}
hist(assay(Tcells, "counts") |> as.vector(), breaks = 100, main = "Histogram of counts", xlab = "Counts")
```

```{r}
hist(assay(Tcells, "logcounts") |> as.vector(), breaks = 100, main = "Histogram of logcounts", xlab = "Logcounts")
```

```{r}
# likely went through Seurat's ScaleData pipeline = x-mean/sd, hard capped at 10
hist(assay(Tcells, "scaledata") |> as.vector(), breaks = 100, main = "Histogram of scaled data", xlab = "Scaled data")
```

```{r}
colData(Tcells) |> as.data.frame() |> distinct(subject, imageID, patient_rejection_type, biopsy_rejection_type) |>
  arrange(subject)
```

```{r}
Tcells$subject |> unique()
```


```{r}
# whether rejection responded to immunotherapy
Tcells$resolution_broad |> unique()
```

```{r}
# set r = 100 based on the size of these images (50 might be too small?)
Tcells |> colData() |> as.data.frame() |>
  dplyr::group_by(imageID) |>
  dplyr::summarise(max_x = max(x), max_y = max(y)) 
```

## Subset data

```{r}
Tcells |> colData() |> as.data.frame() |> 
  dplyr::distinct(patient_rejection_type, subject, biopsy_timing, resolution_broad) |> 
  filter(biopsy_timing == "post") |> 
  pull(resolution_broad) |> table()
```


```{r}
set.seed(51773)

# filter to post transplant, cellular rejection                                                                          
# randomly pick 1 image per patient
imageIdx = colData(Tcells) |> as.data.frame() |>
  filter(biopsy_timing == "post" & patient_rejection_type == "cellular_rejection") |>
  distinct(subject, imageID) |>
  group_by(subject) |>
  slice_sample(n = 1) |>
  pull(imageID)

TcellsSub = Tcells[, Tcells$imageID %in% imageIdx]
```

## Bootstrapping

```{r}
# function to scale expression after sampling
scaleCount = function(x) {
  x = log1p(x / sum(x) * 1e4)
  s = sd(x)
  if (s == 0) return(x - mean(x))
  (x - mean(x)) / s
}

countMat  = assay(TcellsSub, "counts") |> t() |> as.matrix()
labels    = TcellsSub$cellType
scaledMat = t(apply(countMat, 1, scaleCount))

nBoot = 50

RNGkind("L'Ecuyer-CMRG")
set.seed(51773)

results = bplapply(seq_len(nBoot), function(b) {

  bootMat = t(vapply(seq_len(nrow(countMat)), function(i) {
    x     = countMat[i, ]
    total = sum(x)
    if (total == 0) return(scaleCount(x))
    resampled = as.numeric(rmultinom(1, total, x / total))
    scaleCount(resampled)
  }, numeric(ncol(countMat))))

  colnames(bootMat) = colnames(countMat)
  keep = apply(bootMat, 2, var) > 0
  fit  = MASS::lda(bootMat[, keep], labels)
  as.character(predict(fit, scaledMat[, keep])$class)

}, BPPARAM = MulticoreParam(workers = parallel::detectCores() - 1))

predMatrix     = do.call(cbind, results)
confidenceScore = apply(predMatrix, 1, function(x) max(table(x)) / nBoot)
majorityLabel   = apply(predMatrix, 1, function(x) names(which.max(table(x))))
```
